title: Midnight-Craving Malaysian Nougat Satay
description: A rich and crispy Malaysian dessert perfect for late-night cravings, made with sugar syrup, coconut milk, and a hint of pandan.
instructions: Combine coconut milk, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and pandan extract in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add in butter and whisk until melted.
Remove from heat and stir in salt and water.
In a separate bowl, whip egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Fold egg whites into cooled sugar mixture until well combined.
Add in chopped pecans and mix until evenly distributed.
Pour mixture onto a parchment-lined baking sheet and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Cut into desired shapes and serve chilled.
If using a caramel syrup, drizzle over satay before serving.
